description: Complete guide to binary trees including structure, traversal, and core operations.

sections.title: What is a Binary Tree?
sections.definition: A binary tree is a hierarchical data structure where each node has at most two children (left and right).
sections.analogy: Like a decision tree or family tree.

sections.title: Tree Traversals
sections.definition: Inorder, Preorder, and Postorder traversal methods.
